title: Knowledge Book Last Edition [Recipes Backport]
description: This pack brings to previous versions the new crafting recipes added to items that could not be crafted before.
body:
"**Knowledge Book Last Edition**" is a simple datapack that brings to previous versions the new crafting recipes added to items that could not be crafted (or were difficult to craft) before.

**Recipes added:**

- Bundle
- Saddle
- Name Tag
- Lodestone
- Lead
